921 ALTRD_DIET_7_DAY_CD ALTRD_DIET_7_DAY_CD K0520C3 Nutritional Approaches (7-day): Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed a mechanically altered diet while a resident of the facility and within the last seven days. 0=No
